name: Vanguarr
overview: Syncs per-user Suggested for You playlists from Vanguarr into Jellyfin.
description: Connects Jellyfin to Vanguarr's Suggested for You API, resolves ranked suggestions to existing library items, and keeps a per-user playlist fresh without extra libraries or symlink trees.

versions.changelog:
- Initial Vanguarr Jellyfin plugin release.
- Syncs per-user Suggested for You playlists from Vanguarr snapshots.
- Includes an admin config page for the Vanguarr URL, API key, sync interval, suggestion limit, and playlist name.
